document.name: Kiscelli Pub District
document.shortDescription: Hillside pub quarter near Aquincum — cellar bars and live folk nights on Kiscelli út.
document.longDescription:
The Kiscelli út pub strip above Aquincum mixes museum culture with weekend bar crawls in former monastery cellars. Live folk and rock bands play small rooms frequented by Óbuda locals. Museum info on kiscellimuzeum.hu.

Sources: https://www.kiscellimuzeum.hu/
